reviews.review_msg: This course covers fascinating history on indigenous treaties you wouldn't encounter elsewhere. She explains the material with passion and knowledge. You get two attempts for each online quiz and plenty of time to do them. This course is fun, easy, and genuinely interesting. Highly recommend to take this course with her!

one of the lowest effort courses i have ever taken. everything is graded from the quizzes and two non-cumulative midterms. wouldnt take it again only because this course felt like a joke to pay for and felt like a course that would be free online.
